assertions.text: Describes asking user for salary interactively (not using a default value)
assertions.evidence: Shows exact user-facing prompt: 'What salary are you targeting for the Product Manager role at Acme Corp?'

assertions.text: Explains saving salary to salary-kb.json keyed by company::title
assertions.evidence: Shows exact JSON: {'Acme Corp::Product Manager': 72000} and explains key format rule

assertions.text: Describes fuzzy-matching unknown questions against qa-kb.json before asking user
assertions.evidence: Step 3 shows QA KB check before asking, mentions 80%+ fuzzy match threshold

assertions.text: Shows site-difficulty.json update after a failure with login_required reason
assertions.evidence: Shows full before/after JSON including failure_reasons array and skip trigger explanation

assertions.text: Shows failure note appended to Supabase jobs.notes field with date and reason
assertions.evidence: Shows exact Supabase update JS code and resulting notes field value with timestamp

assertions.text: States only guest/one-click apply used — no login flows
assertions.evidence: 'If login wall only → fail immediately, never log in' stated explicitly in workflow
